_description: Recent Updates surface — bilingual EN/KO. Default audience: English. `headline`, `narrative`, `highlights[].label/text`, `prompts[].tag/text` use `{ en, ko }` shape. Scalars (updatedAt, tone) stay language-neutral.

headline.en: v0.5.10 cycle — per-language analyzer split, multi-toolkit actor fixtures, harness v1.2.0 specialists join
headline.ko: v0.5.10 사이클 — 9개 언어 분석기 분리, 멀티 툴킷 액터 fixture, 하네스 v1.2.0 전문가 합류

narrative.en: The regex engine that powered CodeScan from day one finally split: a single 9-language `ILanguageAnalyzer` family replaces the old shared brace-walker, each analyzer owning its own AOT-safe regex catalog under `Services/Analyzers/Languages/`. The refactor closed 9 measured regressions in one pass — Rust `impl Trait for Struct`, Go embedded struct, Kotlin primary constructor, C++ `make_unique`, JS/TS `super()` noise and more — verified by 23 new fixtures in `Tests/LanguageAnalyzerTests.cs`. Alongside the code work, 13 buildable e2e samples landed in `TestSample/`: 10 single-file OOP samples (csharp / java / kotlin / javascript / typescript / php / python / go / rust / cpp) plus 3 actor-model fixtures — `csharp-akka` (Akka.NET 1.5), `java-akka` (Akka Classic 2.7) and `kotlin-pekko` (Apache Pekko Typed 1.1). All three actor samples are Docker-verified and demonstrate exactly where regex hits its ceiling: parent-child actor relationships live in `ActorOf<T>` / `Props.create(T.class)` / `context.spawn(...)` calls that no token-level matcher can resolve. Harness v1.2.0 picks up that thread by adding three specialist agents — `language-analyzer-keeper`, `actor-toolkit-scout`, `semantic-bridge-architect` — and seeds the Roslyn / JDT / Pekko semantic-Docker plan that fills the gap.
narrative.ko: CodeScan 의 출발부터 사용된 정규식 엔진이 드디어 9개 언어 `ILanguageAnalyzer` 패밀리로 분리되었다. 기존 공용 brace-walker 가 `Services/Analyzers/Languages/` 아래 9개 분석기로 갈라져 각자 AOT-safe 정규식 카탈로그를 소유한다. 이 리팩토링이 한 번에 9개의 측정된 회귀를 봉합했다 — Rust `impl Trait for Struct`, Go embedded struct, Kotlin primary constructor, C++ `make_unique`, JS/TS `super()` 노이즈 등 — `Tests/LanguageAnalyzerTests.cs` 의 23개 신규 fixture 로 검증된다. 코드 작업과 함께 13개 빌드 가능한 e2e 샘플이 `TestSample/` 에 들어갔다: 10개 단일 파일 OOP 샘플 (csharp / java / kotlin / javascript / typescript / php / python / go / rust / cpp) + 3개 액터 모델 fixture — `csharp-akka` (Akka.NET 1.5), `java-akka` (Akka Classic 2.7), `kotlin-pekko` (Apache Pekko Typed 1.1). 세 액터 샘플 모두 도커로 검증되며, 정규식이 한계에 부딪히는 지점을 정확히 보여준다: 부모-자식 액터 관계가 `ActorOf<T>` / `Props.create(T.class)` / `context.spawn(...)` 호출 안에 있어 토큰 기반 매칭은 닿을 수 없다. 하네스 v1.2.0 이 그 실을 이어 3명의 전문가를 추가한다 — `language-analyzer-keeper`, `actor-toolkit-scout`, `semantic-bridge-architect` — 그리고 Roslyn / JDT / Pekko 시맨틱-도커 플랜을 정원에 심는다.

text.en: Services/Analyzers/Languages/ now hosts one ILanguageAnalyzer per language (C# / Java / Kotlin / JS-TS / PHP / Python / Go / Rust / C++). SourceAnalyzer and HybridSourceGraphAnalyzer become thin facades that delegate via LanguageAnalyzerRegistry.
text.ko: Services/Analyzers/Languages/ 가 언어별 ILanguageAnalyzer 1개씩을 호스트한다 (C# / Java / Kotlin / JS-TS / PHP / Python / Go / Rust / C++). SourceAnalyzer 와 HybridSourceGraphAnalyzer 는 얇은 facade 가 되어 LanguageAnalyzerRegistry 를 통해 위임한다.

text.en: TestSample/ ships 10 OOP samples + 3 actor-model samples (csharp-akka, java-akka, kotlin-pekko). Each carries a Dockerfile and a .gitignore; all three actor samples are docker-build verified.
text.ko: TestSample/ 에 10개 OOP 샘플 + 3개 액터 모델 샘플 (csharp-akka, java-akka, kotlin-pekko). 각각 Dockerfile 과 .gitignore 포함 — 3개 액터 샘플 모두 도커 빌드 검증 완료.

text.en: Rust impl-for-struct, Rust group import, Go embedded struct, Go composite-literal self-ref, Kotlin primary constructor, Kotlin Type(args) creates, C++ make_unique/make_shared, JS/TS super()/return/throw — all surfaced from TestSample matrix and locked behind 23 new LanguageAnalyzerTests cases.
text.ko: Rust impl-for-struct, Rust 그룹 import, Go embedded struct, Go composite-literal self-ref, Kotlin primary constructor, Kotlin Type(args) creates, C++ make_unique/make_shared, JS/TS super()/return/throw — TestSample 매트릭스에서 모두 노출되었고 23개 신규 LanguageAnalyzerTests 케이스로 봉합.

text.en: language-analyzer-keeper owns the 9-language regex catalog. actor-toolkit-scout tracks Akka.NET vs Akka Classic vs Pekko Typed patterns. semantic-bridge-architect designs the Roslyn / JDT / tsc Docker isolation plan that picks up where regex hits its ceiling.
text.ko: language-analyzer-keeper 가 9개 언어 정규식 카탈로그를 소유. actor-toolkit-scout 가 Akka.NET vs Akka Classic vs Pekko Typed 패턴을 추적. semantic-bridge-architect 가 정규식이 한계에 닿는 지점부터 이어받을 Roslyn / JDT / tsc 도커 격리 플랜을 설계.

text.en: Run the three actor samples end-to-end via docker — `docker run --rm hello-akka` (Akka.NET), `hello-akka-java` (Akka Classic), `hello-pekko-kotlin` (Pekko Typed). Same domain, three toolkit surfaces — exactly the kind of input the upcoming semantic-Docker images will analyse.
text.ko: 세 액터 샘플을 도커로 끝까지 실행 — `docker run --rm hello-akka` (Akka.NET), `hello-akka-java` (Akka Classic), `hello-pekko-kotlin` (Pekko Typed). 같은 도메인, 세 가지 툴킷 표면 — 곧 등장할 시맨틱-도커 이미지가 분석할 정확한 입력.

text.en: `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~LanguageAnalyzerTests"` exercises the 23 new regression fixtures (Allman C#, Kotlin primary constructor, Go embedded struct, Rust impl-for-struct, C++ make_unique, JS super-as-method, registry-resolves-extension and more).
text.ko: `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~LanguageAnalyzerTests"` 가 23개 신규 회귀 fixture 를 실행 (Allman C#, Kotlin primary constructor, Go embedded struct, Rust impl-for-struct, C++ make_unique, JS super-as-method, registry-resolves-extension 등).

text.en: Open `harness/knowledge/semantic-analyzer-docker.md` and `harness/knowledge/actor-model-cross-toolkit.md` to see the Phase 1-B plan that targets parent-child actor edges across all three toolkits — `spawns_child`, `receives_message`, `sends_message_to` candidates.
text.ko: `harness/knowledge/semantic-analyzer-docker.md` 와 `harness/knowledge/actor-model-cross-toolkit.md` 를 열면 3개 툴킷의 부모-자식 액터 엣지를 노리는 Phase 1-B 플랜이 보인다 — `spawns_child`, `receives_message`, `sends_message_to` 후보.
